quality_risks: The data page does not identify the upstream sources of descriptions, notes, or image URLs.
The publisher's authority to apply CC0 to every field is not evidenced.
The schema does not identify Fragrance Edition concentration.
The schema has no main accords, note pyramid, or scent-family fields.
Missing-value, duplicate, and malformed-row rates have not been measured from a pinned artifact.
Remote image URLs may have separate copyright and availability constraints.
